title: Stress Testing Factual Consistency Metrics for Long-Document...
body: Evaluating the factual consistency of abstractive text summarization remains a significant challenge, particularly for long documents, where conventional metrics struggle with input length limitations and long-range dependencies.

title: Evaluating Effective Email Summarization Tools for... - GLCND.IO
body: Measuring Success: Metrics and Evaluation. Evaluating the effectiveness of email summarization tools requires robust metrics. Common benchmarks include ROUGE scores, which measure the overlap of phrases between the generated summary and reference summaries.

title: Multilingual Factual Consistency Evaluation
body: Multilingual factual consistency evaluation is the process of assessing real-world information across languages by aligning entities and schema for coherent, accurate representation.

title: Enterprise Text Summarization with LLMs: Real Use Cases - Addepto
body: Effective enterprise evaluation requires multiple layers: Semantic similarity analysis. Factual consistency verification. Grounding checks against source material.Email Thread Summarization: Summarizing email conversations to quickly identify key points.
